results.title: AI Security Engineer - Hardware & Adversarial Machine Learning job with Keysight Technologies, Inc. | 5542194
highlights:
AI Security Engineer - Hardware & Adversarial Machine Learning job with Keysight Technologies, Inc. | 5542194
...
# AI Security Engineer - Hardware & Adversarial Machine Learning
...
Employer Keysight Technologies, Inc. Location Delft, Netherlands Salary Competitive Closing date 31 Jul 2026
...
Sector Engineering, IT, Security Job Role Security Engineer Job Type Permanent
...
## Job Details
...
OverviewKeysight is at the forefront of technology innovation, delivering breakthroughs and trusted insights in electronic design, simulation, prototyping, test, manufacturing, and optimization. Our ~15,000 employees create world-class solutions in communications, 5G, automotive, energy, quantum, aerospace, defense, and semiconductor markets for customers in over 100 countries. Learn more about what we do.Our award-winning culture embraces a bold vision of where technology can take us and a passion for tackling challenging problems with industry-first solutions. We believe that when people feel a sense of belonging, they can be more creative, innovative, and thrive at all points in their careers.We are offering a research-driven security role who enjoy solving complex technical problems and want to gain hands-on experience in cryptography, high-performance computing, and hardware security.In this role, you will work closely with experienced researchers and engineers on real security research topics, combining theoretical foundations with practical experimentation and development. The focus is on understanding how security implementations behave under stress - and how they can be improved. On a day-to-day basis, you will write code, run experiments, discuss ideas with your mentor, and turn technical findings into clear results. You don't need to be an expert in everything on day one - strong fundamentals, curiosity, and motivation to learn matter most.Responsibilities
...
- Define and implement an end-to-end approach for securing and ensuring the privacy of AI systems in security-critical applications.
...
- Investigation of fault injection and side-channel attack vectors against AI models
...
- Perform systematic threat analysis of AI systems, considering both adversarial attack vectors and system vulnerabilities.
...
- Design, develop, and evaluate countermeasures to enhance the robustness and resilience of AI solutions against hardware attacks.
...
- Establish rigorous methodologies for security evaluation of AI systems based on empirical attack and defense studies.
...
- Execute hands-on validation, including physical testing of AI systems and protection mechanisms using state-of the art tooling.
...
- Develop and contribute to virtual testing environments that simulate real-world deployments and adversarial scenarios.
...
- Academic or higher professional (technical) education, preferably at MSc level in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
...
- Background in Hardware Security, Cryptography, or Information Security, with experience in security evaluation techniques such as Fault Injection (FI), Side-Channel Analysis (SCA), or related methodologies
...
- Prior research experience (academic or industrial) or a strong motivation to work in a research-driven environment
...
- Interest in performance-oriented development, including hands-on coding and programming (e.g., C/C++, Python, or similar)
...
- Ability to work independently while contributing effectively to a collaborative, multidisciplinary team
...
- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English
...
- Must have graduated within the last 2 years
...
- Eligibility to work in the Netherlands / European Union
...
This is a 1-year initial training contract (ITW) opportunity to transition into a full-time Security Engineer role based on performance.Careers Privacy Statement***Keysight is an Equal Opportunity Employer.***

### Machine Learning Models for Peptide Toxicity Predicition.
...
Engaged in an ongoing project focused on developing a machine learning model for peptide toxicity prediction. The project utilizes advanced feature extraction techniques such as Amino Acid Composition (AAC), Dipeptide Composition (DPC), and Evolutionary Scale Modeling (ESM) to represent peptide sequences effectively. Employing the LazyPredict library, various machine learning models are benchmarked to predict the toxicity of given proteins or peptides, classifying them as toxic or non-toxic. The dataset is divided into training, testing, and validation subsets to ensure robust model training and evaluation. Continuous enhancements are planned to improve model accuracy and performance over time. Show less

results.title: Nishant G.
highlights:
Senior Information Technology Manager at [Keysight Technologies](https://www.linkedin.com/company/keysight-technologies)
...
I build LLM systems that actually ship — not demos, not wrappers, not slideware. Twelve years as a.NET and full-stack engineer across Keysight, Tollring, OTS Solutions and ZSuite taught me that the gap between a working prototype and a production system is where most AI projects die. I spend my time closing that gap. What I do now: • Fine-tune open-source LLMs (Llama 3.1, Qwen 2.5, Mistral) using LoRA/QLoRA for manufacturing and distribution use cases — bearing recommendation, inventory forecasting, sales prediction, lead scoring. • Architect RAG pipelines with hybrid search, reranking, and evaluation harnesses so enterprise teams can trust the output. • Design agentic workflows that integrate with the systems businesses already run — Odoo, Razorpay, Ekart Logistics, WhatsApp Business. • Use Cursor, VS Code AI tooling, and MCP servers to cut feature-delivery time on legacy.NET and web stacks. What I did before: Shipped enterprise C#/.NET, ASP.NET MVC, and Angular systems for telecoms (Tollring), test & measurement (Keysight), and fintech (ZSuite).
...

# R&D Expert Analog Engineer
...
Posted Jun 30, 2026
...
- Overview:
...
- Keysight is at the forefront of technology innovation, delivering breakthroughs and trusted insights in electronic design, simulation, prototyping, test, manufacturing, and optimization. Our ~15,000 employees create world-class solutions in communications, 5G, automotive, energy, quantum, aerospace, defense, and semiconductor markets for customers in over 100 countries. Learn more about what we do.
...
- Designs Keysight products and specifies the components that make up the products. Designs and develops products, components, processes, and systems using broad engineering concepts and research techniques. Documents research and design specifications. Solves complex and high impact design and development problems including customer application issue of varying scope and complexity. Uses product and customer applications knowledge to determine, define, develop and validate design concepts and methods. May facilitate transition of product design and enhancements to full production/delivery. May lead product definition/system design for complex features or coordinate a small group in feature development and integration.
...
- To define and develop a general purpose measurement solution to meet customer and market demands.
- To define the system architecture and capture requirements for the new measurement solutions.
- To collaborate with different team to ensure the product meets system requirements.
- To actively participate in design verification testing and characterization of the product.
...
Work based competencies:
...
- Good knowledge in analog design for low-noise, high accuracy measurements. Deep understanding of ADC/ DAC architectures and samplng theory.
- Appreciation of performance trade-offs in measurement design for cost-sensitive and high-volume applications
...
- Experience in designing low-level signals, isolation, safety considerations, error budgeting, calibration and metrology fundamentals.
...
- Good understanding of EMC standards, electrical safety regulations and circuit techniques to achieve compliance.
...
- Proficiency with software tools such as LTspice, Simulink, Saber, Simplis, Matlab, FPGA simulation etc.
- Demonstrated ability to write accurate and concise technical documentation including bench evaluations and simulation results.
- Practical bench skills and confident user of lab equipment.
- Familiarity with digital circuit design, DSP, microcontrollers, FPGA prototyping and Verilog programming (preferred not a must).

highlights:
# Licensing Senior Linux C/C++ Software Engineer
...
Overview: Keysight is at the forefront of technology innovation, delivering breakthroughs and trusted insights in electronic design, simulation, prototyping, test, manufacturing, and optimization. Our ~15,000 employees create world-class solutions in communications, 5G, automotive, energy, quantum, aerospace, defense, and semiconductor markets for customers in over 100 countries. Learn more about what we do. Our award-winning culture embraces a bold vision of where technology can take us and a passion for tackling challenging problems with industry-first solutions. We believe that when people feel a sense of belonging, they can be more creative, innovative, and thrive at all points in their careers. 

## Responsibilities: First, you will work with the latest Keysight products and technologies; You will be a part of young and passionate team with strong senior software engineers and will participate in the analysis, design, development and maintenance of cross platform software components Interact with project management, leads, testers and other developers in order to understand the features, planning the schedule, designing and implementing the solutions, optimizing, and performing development testing and bug-fixing in order to deliver high quality releases on time.
...
## Qualifications: Good knowledge of C/C++ programming languages; Good knowledge of Linux user space programming; Good knowledge of multithreading programming; Good knowledge of cross platform programming best practices; Good OOP knowledge; Good algorithms/data structures knowledge; Ability to quickly learn and grasp new technologies; Desire and ability to work in a highly collaborative, team-oriented environment; Good verbal and written communication skills; Prove to be performance driven and having a proactive attitude; Bonus skills Knowledge of Linux containers / Kubernetes is a plus Golang is plus C#, Java knowledge is a plus; Scripting knowledge is a plus (bash, python); Windows programming knowledge is a plus; STL and Boost 3rd party libraries knowledge is a plus; Careers Privacy Statement ***Keysight is an Equal Opportunity Employer.***

The Technical Marketing Initiative Manager will be responsible for planning, executing, and overseeing marketing initiatives that align with Keysight's goals in the HSD and AI market. This role requires a strategic thinker with a passion for marketing and a proven track record of successful campaign management. Key Responsibilities: Develop and implement marketing strategies and campaigns for HSD/ AI market growth. Analyze market trends and competitor activities to identify opportunities. Proficiency in marketing software and tools. Creative thinking and problem-solving abilities. Overview: Keysight is at the forefront of technology innovation, delivering breakthroughs and trusted insights in electronic design, simulation, prototyping, test, manufacturing, and optimization. Our ~15,000 employees create world-class solutions in communications, 5G, automotive, energy, quantum, aerospace, defense, and semiconductor markets for customers in over 100 countries. Learn more about what we do. Our award-winning culture embraces a bold vision of where technology can take us and a passion for tackling challenging problems with industry-first solutions. We believe that when people feel a sense of belonging, they can be more creative, innovative, and thrive at all points in their careers. Aerospace and Defense Government Services (ADGS) seeks an experienced engineer with strong track record and credentials showing deep expertise in 5G test and emulation challenges and knowledge of Keysight’s wide range of solutions to successfully generate and close business opportunities with focus on Europe and the UK.
...
## Responsibilities: This position is focused on identifying and developing new customer engagements in the Aerospace/Defense industry that requires expertise in wireless telecom systems with emphasis on 5G and proprietary Non-Terrestrial Networks. Some prior industry experience with satellite network operators is highly desired. You will be expected to initiate and lead successful business opportunities, often requiring extensive evaluation of Keysight solutions by customers. Key product lines include Base Station and UE emulators and protocol analyzers (PL13) and channel emulators (PL DI).
...
## Qualifications: Master of Science or Diplomate in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, 5-7 years experience directly supporting customers doing wireless network design, testing / emulation and/or quality of service monitoring Fluency in English and French Up to 40% travel required (Primarily UK and EU but possibility of some WW travel) Preferred work locations: Winnersh or Fleet, UK, Les Ulis or Toulouse FR, Boeblingen or Munich GER)

# Engr III Cslt-AI Science

This role will focus on architecting, developing, and deploying end-to-end, AI-powered commercial applications. This is a high-impact, individual contributor role demanding deep technical expertise across the modern software engineering stack and AI/Machine Learning methodologies
...
The Full Stack AI Engineer will work closely with data science, software engineering, and product teams at Verizon to proactively design and develop intelligent applications. These capabilities will encompass generative AI, predictive, prescriptive, and adaptive applications for all inferences at Verizon. Solutions will be implemented seamlessly from the user interface (front-end) to the database and infrastructure layer (back-end/cloud), operating in real-time, streaming, and batch modes depending on business needs.
...
At Verizon, we are on a multi-year journey to industrialize our data science and AI capabilities. Very simply, this means that AI will fuel all decisions and user experiences across the company. At $130B+ in annual revenue, this is a pioneering opportunity to design and shape full-stack AI at scale in the Telco industry. With our leadership in bringing 5G networks nationwide, the opportunity for AI will only grow exponentially. Therefore, it is critical that this candidate possesses proven experience in not just researching AI techniques, but actively engineering the scalable, full-stack applications that bring them to life.
...
Architect and Develop End-to-End AI Applications
...
Lead the full-stack development of next-generation AI applications, ensuring seamless integration between complex AI models (LLMs, predictive models) and modern web interfaces.
...
Design and deploy scalable APIs and microservices to serve machine learning models using modern frameworks (e.g., FastAPI, Node.js, GraphQL).

Develop intuitive, responsive front-end interfaces (React, Next.js, Vue) that allow users to interact with AI models effectively.

...
Test and validate AI methods, ensuring privacy, ethical modeling practices, and bias-free implementations.

Operate as an expert and thought leader in both Full Stack Engineering and AI/MLOps, establishing best practices for the CI/CD of machine learning applications.
...
Elevate the AI Practice
...
Partner with academia and the startup ecosystem to identify new AI approaches (e.g., Agentic AI, advanced GenAI workflows) and modern software tools that deliver value to Verizon.
...
You will need to have:
...
Bachelor’s degree or four or more years of work experience.
...
Experience independently developing algorithms, writing production-grade code, and deploying complex software/AI solutions to production.
...
Experience scaling AI in commercial applications (e.g., Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Personalization, Computer Vision) and integrating them into full-stack applications.
...
Full Stack Development: Expertise in modern backend languages and frameworks (Python/FastAPI, Node.js, Go).Strong proficiency in modern frontend frameworks (React, Next.js, TypeScript/JavaScript, TailwindCSS).
...
AI/ML & Data Engineering: Deep understanding of underlying math/algorithms combined with expertise in ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow) and ML libraries (Scikit-learn, Hugging Face).Hands-on experience with modern AI stacks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, OpenAI APIs) and Vector Databases.
...
Infrastructure & Data: Experience with building and maintaining streaming and batch data pipelines (Kafka, Spark) in production.Strong knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).

Core Competencies: Exposure to advanced data structures, data modeling, and modern software architecture patterns.

...
Machine-Learning
...
# Staff AI Engineer - Design Automation
...
Sandisk Drive 991, San Jose
...
- We require a masters degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a closely related discipline. - We look for at least 3 years of industry experience. - We need familiarity with semiconductors or EDA, such as RTL design, verification, physical design, or EDA tool development. - We expect a foundational understanding of AI/ML, including how models are trained and evaluated. - We need strong programming ability and a track record of building reliable, production-ready systems. - We value systems thinking and the ability to diagnose subtle, complex technical issues. - We require clear communication skills and the ability to connect different technical disciplines. - A PhD in EE, CE, CS, or a related field is preferred. - Deep expertise in semiconductor areas such as verification methodologies, synthesis, timing closure, or DFT is preferred. - Deep expertise in AI/ML, including model architectures, NLP, or reinforcement learning, is preferred. - Hands-on experience with LLMs, RAG architectures, or agentic systems is preferred. - Experience with EDA tool internals or automation scripting is preferred. - Publications or notable projects in semiconductor or AI/ML are preferred.
...
## Responsibilities
...
- We design and build AI agents that automate multi-step semiconductor workflows. - We develop the agent platform, including orchestration, tool integration, observability, and evaluation capabilities. - We work closely with design and verification engineers to understand pain points and uncover high-impact automation opportunities. - We create methods to ground agents in domain knowledge such as specifications, design rules, and verification intent. - We build rigorous evaluation frameworks to measure reliability, correctness, and safety. - We debug difficult issues across the full stack, from model behavior to infrastructure and domain-specific edge cases. - We ship systems that perform reliably in real production settings, not just impressive demonstrations.
...
We are Sandisk, a global innovator in Flash and advanced memory technologies, with a long history of shaping the digital world through performance, quality, and manufacturing excellence. We operate at the intersection of customer ambition and technological progress, and our facilities have been recognized by the World Economic Forum for advanced 4IR innovation and sustainability. In this role, we are building AI agents that automate complex semiconductor engineering workflows, and we offer a comprehensive compensation and benefits package that includes incentive plans, potential equity participation, paid time off, insurance coverage, retirement support, tuition reimbursement, transit benefits, and employee wellness programs. We are committed to equal opportunity, inclusion, and supporting applicants with disabilities.

# Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 5) - 26231
...
HII’
...
- Our team of more than 7,000 professionals worldwide delivers all-domain expertise and advanced technologies in service of mission partners across the globe. Mission Technologies is leading the next evolution of national defense – the data evolution - by accelerating a breadth of national security solutions for government and commercial customers. Our capabilities range from C5ISR, AI and Big Data, cyber operations and synthetic training environments to fleet sustainment, environmental remediation and the largest family of unmanned underwater vehicles in every class. Find the role that’s right for you. Apply today. We look forward to meeting you.
...
HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team’s office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
...
- Operational AI Implementation: Research, develop, and apply machine learning, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) techniques for deployment in operational environments.
...
- Full Stack Design and Development: Rapidly design and create prototype applications to demonstrate AI capabilities. Transition prototypes to production by designing and implementing well-architected, scalable software stacks.
...
- Client Engagement: Support meetings with internal clients and external customers as a subject matter expert in AI and advanced software solutions, with a focus on cloud technologies and generative AI.
...
- 15 years relevant experience with Bachelors in related field; 13 years relevant experience with Masters in related field; 10 years relevant experience with PhD or Juris Doctorate in related field; or High School Diploma or equivalent and 19 years relevant experience.
...

- Containerized development and deployment: Docker, Rancher, and/or K8s.
- Cloud engineering: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
- Databases: SQL, NoSQL, and/or vector databases.
- CI/CD pipeline management.
